description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a dark, broad gable roof and stone-clad exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered entryway with stone columns and large windows, while the rear side has a more continuous stone wall with smaller window openings. The roof is punctuated by several chimneys and skylights, adding architectural interest and functionality. The building sits on a neatly defined grassy plot with paved walkways leading to the entrances. The overall design is low and horizontal, emphasizing a strong connection to the surrounding landscape. The use of natural stone and wood elements gives the bungalow a rustic yet modern appearance.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, stone exterior walls, and large windows, set on a grassy plot with paved walkways. The design is low, horizontal, and blends rustic and modern elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, stone columns, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the gable roof and the stone side wall with a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous stone wall with smaller windows and multiple chimneys on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a secondary entrance with a covered area and visible skylights on the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
